html:
Exclusive to:

Naked Nostrils are Food items exclusive to Don't Starve Together. They are dropped by Naked Mole Bats upon death.

Raw Naked Nostrils are needed to craft the Milkmade Hat, when combined with Kelp Fronds and a dairy product inside of a Crock Pot.

Charred Nostrils

Charred Nostrils are Food items obtained by cooking Naked Nostrils over a fire.

Trivia

  • Naked Nostrils and Charred Nostrils were introduced in the Forgotten Knowledge update.
By TypeBy Crock Pot Value

“Who knows whose nose this is?”
–Wilson
“Ewww.”
–Willow
“Is naked? Wolfgang will look away.”
–Wolfgang
“It won't be bothering us anymore.”
–Wendy
“UGH. ORGANIC PARTS ARE SO SQUISHY”
–WX-78
“Evolution truly is remarkable.”
–Wickerbottom
“Who nose where the rest of it went.”
–Woodie
“It smells.”
–Maxwell
“A tröphy fröm the hunt.”
–Wigfrid
“A rosy pink nosey”
–Webber
“This will be a challenging ingredient.”
–Warly
“Chewy”
–Wormwood
“Got yer nose!”
–Winona
“Oh my, looks like somebody blew it.”
–Wortox
“Glurph... don't like it.”
–Wurt
“Looks like someone got a bit nosy. Get it? Because it's a nose?”
–Walter
“That should teach it not to stick its nose where it doesn't belong!”
–Wanda
Naked Nostrils are Food items exclusive to Don't Starve Together. They are dropped by Naked Mole Bats upon death.
Raw Naked Nostrils are needed to craft the Milkmade Hat, when combined with Kelp Fronds and a dairy product inside of a Crock Pot.
Charred Nostrils[edit | edit source]
“It came out smelling like a nose.”
–Wilson
“Is that supposed to make it better?”
–Willow
“Nose has been toasted.”
–Wolfgang
“It doesn't look more appetizing now.”
–Wendy
“YOUR NUTRIENTS ARE MINE”
–WX-78
“It's moderately better.”
–Wickerbottom
“Nothing worse than a cold nose.”
–Woodie
“The things I must do to survive...”
–Maxwell
“If it's meat, I shall eat it!”
–Wigfrid
“It looks very chewy.”
–Webber
“It could use some marinade, perhaps.”
–Warly
“Crispy”
–Wormwood
“I ain't picky.”
–Winona
“This smells! I think it's gone off!”
–Wortox
“Nuh-uh.”
–Wurt
“It sure doesn't smell so good now...”
–Walter
“It hardly makes a difference whether it's raw or cooked.”
–Wanda
Charred Nostrils are Food items obtained by cooking Naked Nostrils over a fire.

×4

Naked Nostrils and Charred Nostrils were introduced in the Forgotten Knowledge update.

Tóm tắt

Lỗ mũi trần là Đồ ăn độc quyền của Don't Starve Together. Chúng rơi ra từ Dơi Chũi Khỏa Thân khi chết.

'''Naked Nostrils''' are Food items exclusive to ''[[Don't Starve Together]]''. They are dropped by [[Naked Mole Bat]]s upon death. 

Raw Naked Nostrils are needed to craft the [[Milkmade Hat]], when combined with [[Kelp Fronds]] and a [[dairy]] product inside of a [[Crock Pot]].
== Charred Nostrils ==
